claim: MCP is an open-source standard for connecting AI applications to external systems.
MCP architecture uses hosts, clients, and servers; a host creates one MCP client per server connection.
MCP uses JSON-RPC 2.0 at the data layer and defines standard stdio and Streamable HTTP transports.
MCP servers can expose tools, resources, and prompts; clients may expose roots, sampling, and elicitation.
For stdio transport, MCP servers must not write non-MCP messages to stdout.
